previous_sessions.summary: Built 18 integration tests bridging evals, adversarial, and synthetic modules, verifying post-generation pipeline stages with mocked LLM and filesystem. All 100 tests pass.

Completed Phases 0-2 architecture improvements. Renamed port, decomposed orchestrator (1016->627 lines), built event bus, added use_cases layers, hardened Dockerfiles + security. All 173 tests passing. 29 files changed, +895/-767. Committed to feat/arch-improvement-phases-0-2. Ready for human review PR.
Explored SDD system: agent_sync.py operational, context.json has 2 snippets, 4 prior sessions, 3 experience records. SDD protocol demonstrated with before/log/token/after workflow.
CC-1: built cherenkov/memory/ (SQLite FTS5 MemoryRepository) and cherenkov/hooks/ (SubprocessHookExecutor + HookRegistry). ADR-011 + ADR-012 written. 32 tests all pass, ruff clean, committed de4a5bb
Completed Phase CC-2 Multi-Agent Conductor implementation
Completed CC-4 Scheduling and Routines with APScheduler
Completed CC-5 Remote Control and Teleport
Completed CC-6 CLI Composability and Polish
